full_text:
Zhang Ji 張濟
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Ji (張濟)was born in Wuwei. Junior partner under Li Jue, attacks Liu Biao in bid for supplies but is killed. Zhang Ji was affiliated with Dong Zhuo, Li Jue, and the Han Dynasty. Zhang Ji lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
